{{Quote|The Tantara system. The principal stars are Centis Major and Renaant.|Airen Cracken|<ref name="TUF" />}}
'''Centis Major''' was one of the two stars of the [[Tantara system/Legends|Tantara system]]. The other star was [[Renaant]].

{{Star-stub}}
